notableMoments: 2026 marks Indonesia's first-ever World Cup appearance
The Dutch East Indies (predecessor to Indonesia) competed in the 1938 World Cup, losing 6-0 to Hungary
Indonesia is the most populous country to have never qualified for the World Cup (until 2026)
Population of over 270 million - one of the largest football-supporting nations in the world
Qualified for the 2026 World Cup through the AFC qualification pathway
